scripts.build:views-1: VITE_VIEW_VARIANT=views-1 VITE_BASE_PATH=/CLM/views-1/ vite build --outDir dist/views-1 && node -e "require('fs').copyFileSync('dist/views-1/index.html','dist/views-1/views-prototype.html')"
scripts.build:views-2: VITE_VIEW_VARIANT=views-2 VITE_BASE_PATH=/CLM/views-2/ vite build --outDir dist/views-2 && node -e "require('fs').copyFileSync('dist/views-2/index.html','dist/views-2/views-prototype.html')"
scripts.build:views-3: VITE_VIEW_VARIANT=views-3 VITE_BASE_PATH=/CLM/views-3/ vite build --outDir dist/views-3 && node -e "require('fs').copyFileSync('dist/views-3/index.html','dist/views-3/views-prototype.html')"
scripts.preview:views-1: npm run build:views-1 && vite preview --outDir dist/views-1 --base /CLM/views-1/ --open /CLM/views-1/
scripts.preview:views-2: npm run build:views-2 && vite preview --outDir dist/views-2 --base /CLM/views-2/ --open /CLM/views-2/
scripts.preview:views-3: npm run build:views-3 && vite preview --outDir dist/views-3 --base /CLM/views-3/ --open /CLM/views-3/
